fix_summary: The reschedule flow now releases all booked seats on the source flight before creating the replacement booking, and the automated test suite passed.
approval_reasons: Automated tests passed (8/8), indicating the change works end-to-end.
The implementation is localized to the rescheduling path and preserves existing create/cancel behavior.
Source-flight seat inventory is explicitly released via a helper scoped to the original booking flight before reassignment.
The new helper enumerates passenger seat records, which addresses the multi-seat/passenger concern noted in the plan.
